indications.text:
207 TREXIMET is indicated for the acute treatment of migraine attacks with or without aura in
208 adults. Carefully consider the potential benefits and risks of TREXIMET and other treatment
209 options when deciding to use TREXIMET.
210 TREXIMET is not intended for the prophylactic therapy of migrai...

207 TREXIMET is indicated for the acute treatment of migraine attacks with or without aura in
208 adults. Carefully consider the potential benefits and risks of TREXIMET and other treatment
209 options when deciding to use TREXIMET.

TREXIMET is indicated for the acute treatment of migraine with or without aura in adults and pediatric patients 12 years of age and
older.
Limitations of Use:
• Use only if a clear diagnosis of migraine headache has been established. If a patient has no response to the first migraine attack
treated ...
